title: How AI can bring the DNA of success to every classroom
description: There is “DNA” common in high-performing schools. Artificial intelligence can enhance that DNA and be a bridge to delivering it to every child.
content: The crisis of academic underachievement in the U.S. and the vacuum of support in developing nations are not caused by a lack of knowledge about what works; they are caused by an inability to scale what works. There is “DNA” common in high-performing ... [6724 chars]

title: Grid giants back data centre boom to bolster renewable build-out
description: Surging demand for artificial intelligence is turning into a massive call on the energy market, leaving governments scrambling to work out how to ensure supply.

title: Iran-U.S. Peace Deal Fuels Emerging Market Rally
description: Emerging market stocks and currencies gained momentum on Thursday amid optimism over an impending peace deal between Iran and the United States and ongoing enthusiasm for artificial intelligence tech. This positive market sentiment led to a boost in several national currencies and stock exchanges, despite minor setbacks in some regions.
content: Markets in emerging economies are witnessing a positive turn as indications of a possible peace accord between Iran and the United States emerge. On Thursday, stocks and currencies recorded gains, driven not only by diplomatic hopefuls but also by co... [744 chars]

title: AI and data modernisation emerge as biggest drivers of India's tech spending surge: Report
description: Artificial intelligence and data-led transformation are expected to account for 40-45 per cent of India's change-related technology spending in 2026, as companies accelerate investments in modernising their digital infrastructure, according to Bain & Company's 'India Enterprise Technology Report 2026.'

title: Did Shivon Zilis operate as Elon Musk’s agent at OpenAI?
description: Shivon Zilis’ ties to Elon Musk were detailed in the blockbuster OpenAI trial. Zilis, mother of Musk’s four children, testified on Wednesday (May 6) on whether she ‘funnelled’ information to the billionaire while she was sitting on the artificial intelligence giant’s board. OpenAI’s lawyers have painted her as Musk’s woman inside OpenAI. Tesla boss reportedly also discussed with Zilis poaching OpenAI staff for Tesla
content:
The blockbuster OpenAI trial in an Oakland, California, federal court has pitted the world’s richest man, Elon Musk, against OpenAI’s CEO, Sam Altman, and its co-founder and President, Greg Brockman.

title: Simulations Plus teams up with Nvidia to accelerate AI-driven drug modelling
description: Simulations Plus has announced a collaboration with Nvidia aimed at speeding up drug development by combining advanced simulation software with GPU-powered computing and artificial intelligence tools.The California-based modelling software company said the partnership will focus on improving the speed and scale of scientific workflows used by pharmaceutical researchers, particularly in areas such as quantitative systems pharmacology (QSP) and pharmacokinetics/pharmacodynamics (PK/PD) modelling.
